name: Release or download problem
about: Report a broken release asset, checksum mismatch, or install/download problem.
title: "Release/download: "
---

Use this form for problems with published release assets, package-manager
downloads, checksums, or installation from this release mirror.

Do not report security vulnerabilities here. Use a private advisory or
email security@lavren.dev.
